---
reference: inspect_ai.agent
description: Agent scaffolds and protocol.
---

## Agents

### react
### human_cli

## Deep Agent

### deepagent
### subagent
### Subagent
### research
### plan
### general

## Execution

### handoff
### run
### as_tool
### as_solver

## Bridging

### agent_bridge
### AgentBridge
### sandbox_agent_bridge
### SandboxAgentBridge
### BridgedToolsSpec

## Filters

### content_only
### last_message
### remove_tools
### MessageFilter

## Protocol

### Agent
### AgentState
### agent
### agent_with
### is_agent

## Types

### AgentPrompt
### AgentAttempts
### AgentContinue
### AgentSubmit

## Deprecated

### bridge
